blended.narrative: Hunter Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,955 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
